Name: CHR_PARAM
Description: Core character definition parameters covering stats, equipment, defense, scaling, status effects, and gameplay rules for NPCs and characters.

Fields.Name: Model ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the character model asset.

Fields.Name: Animation ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the character animation set.

Fields.Name: Common ID
Fields.Description: Shared identifier used across multiple character systems.

Fields.Name: Movement ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the movement parameter set used by this character.

Fields.Name: NPC Status ID
Fields.Description: Reference to the NPC status configuration entry.

Fields.Name: Group Type
Fields.Description: Defines the group affiliation of the character.

Fields.Name: Character Category
Fields.Description: Defines the general classification of the character (e.g., enemy, NPC, player-type).

Fields.Name: Body Material Type
Fields.Description: Defines the physical material properties of the character model.

Fields.Name: Visual Type
Fields.Description: Defines appearance variation or visual preset.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Scaling Parameter ID
Fields.Description: Reference to multiplayer balance adjustments for this character.

Fields.Name: Respawn Count
Fields.Description: Number of times the character can respawn.

Fields.Name: Immortal Flag
Fields.Description: If enabled, the character cannot die normally.

Fields.Name: Flee on Fall Death
Fields.Description: If enabled, the character will flee when death occurs from falling.

Fields.Name: HP (New Game Cycle 1)
Fields.Description: Base health value for the first playthrough cycle.

Fields.Name: Stamina
Fields.Description: Total stamina capacity.

Fields.Name: Stamina Recovery Rate
Fields.Description: Stamina recovered per second.

Fields.Name: Stamina Debt (Min)
Fields.Description: Minimum stamina overdraw limit.

Fields.Name: Stamina Debt (Max)
Fields.Description: Maximum stamina overdraw limit.

Fields.Name: Base Movement Stamina Cost
Fields.Description: Base stamina cost for movement actions.

Fields.Name: Death Type 1
Fields.Description: Primary death behavior classification.

Fields.Name: Death Type 2
Fields.Description: Secondary death behavior classification.

Fields.Name: Default Weapon
Fields.Description: Weapon equipped by default on spawn.

Fields.Name: Weapon Slot 1 ID
Fields.Description: First equipped weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Weapon Slot 2 ID
Fields.Description: Second equipped weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Weapon Slot 3 ID
Fields.Description: Third equipped weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Weapon Slot 4 ID
Fields.Description: Fourth equipped weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Weapon Slot 5 ID
Fields.Description: Fifth equipped weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Weapon Slot 6 ID
Fields.Description: Sixth equipped weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Accessory Slot 1 ID
Fields.Description: First accessory slot.

Fields.Name: Accessory Slot 2 ID
Fields.Description: Second accessory slot.

Fields.Name: Accessory Slot 3 ID
Fields.Description: Third accessory slot.

Fields.Name: Accessory Slot 4 ID
Fields.Description: Fourth accessory slot.

Fields.Name: Accessory Slot 5 ID
Fields.Description: Fifth accessory slot.

Fields.Name: NG+ Damage Scaling Category
Fields.Description: Category used for scaling damage in New Game cycles.

Fields.Name: Shield: Guard Level
Fields.Description: Defines passive guard strength level for shields.

Fields.Name: Parry Type
Fields.Description: Defines the type of parry behavior used by the shield.

Fields.Name: Spell Parry SFX ID
Fields.Description: Sound effect played when parrying spells.

Fields.Name: Shield: Material Type
Fields.Description: Defines shield material properties.

Fields.Name: Shield: Guard Strength
Fields.Description: How much physical impact the shield can absorb.

Fields.Name: Shield: Physical Defense
Fields.Description: Physical damage reduction from shield.

Fields.Name: Shield: Magic Resistance
Fields.Description: Magic damage reduction from shield.

Fields.Name: Shield: Miracle Resistance
Fields.Description: Faith/miracle damage resistance.

Fields.Name: Shield: Pyromancy Resistance
Fields.Description: Fire-based magic resistance.

Fields.Name: Shield: Dark Resistance
Fields.Description: Dark magic resistance.

Fields.Name: Shield: Poison Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance to poison buildup.

Fields.Name: Shield: Bleed Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance to bleeding buildup.

Fields.Name: Shield: Durability Damage Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance to equipment durability damage.

Fields.Name: Shield: Curse Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance to curse effects.

Fields.Name: Armor: Physical Defense
Fields.Description: Physical damage reduction from armor.

Fields.Name: Armor: Magic Resistance
Fields.Description: Magic damage reduction from armor.

Fields.Name: Armor: Miracle Resistance
Fields.Description: Faith/miracle resistance from armor.

Fields.Name: Armor: Pyromancy Resistance
Fields.Description: Fire resistance from armor.

Fields.Name: Armor: Dark Resistance
Fields.Description: Dark magic resistance from armor.

Fields.Name: Armor: Poison Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance to poison buildup.

Fields.Name: Armor: Bleed Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance to bleed buildup.

Fields.Name: Armor: Durability Damage Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance to durability loss.

Fields.Name: Armor: Curse Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance to curse effects.

Fields.Name: Armor: Material Type
Fields.Description: Defines material properties of armor.

Fields.Name: Armor: Poise
Fields.Description: Resistance to stagger effects.

Fields.Name: Armor: Stun Gauge (Base)
Fields.Description: Base stun buildup threshold.

Fields.Name: Armor: Stun Recovery Rate
Fields.Description: Rate at which stun buildup recovers per second.

Fields.Name: Soul Reward
Fields.Description: Amount of souls dropped on defeat.

Fields.Name: Drop Type
Fields.Description: Defines loot drop behavior type.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier
Fields.Description: Global damage scaling multiplier.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier (Player)
Fields.Description: Damage scaling against players.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier (Enemy)
Fields.Description: Damage scaling against enemies.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier (Neutral)
Fields.Description: Damage scaling against neutral targets.

Fields.Name: Damage Multiplier (Objects)
Fields.Description: Damage scaling against environmental objects.

Fields.Name: Passive Damage ID 1
Fields.Description: Constant damage effect ID slot 1.

Fields.Name: Passive Damage ID 2
Fields.Description: Constant damage effect ID slot 2.

Fields.Name: Passive Damage ID 3
Fields.Description: Constant damage effect ID slot 3.

Fields.Name: Stun Immunity Flag
Fields.Description: If enabled, the character cannot be stunned.

Fields.Name: Part Guard: Damage
Fields.Description: Enables guarding interactions for damage hits.

Fields.Name: Part Guard: Projectiles
Fields.Description: Enables guarding interactions for bullets/projectiles.

Fields.Name: Part Guard: Spell Parry
Fields.Description: Enables spell parry interactions on body parts.

Fields.Name: Stun Threshold
Fields.Description: Maximum stun buildup before stagger occurs.

Fields.Name: Stun Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: Time-based recovery rate for stun buildup. In seconds per second.

Fields.Name: Modified Stun Threshold
Fields.Description: Alternative stun threshold under special conditions.

Fields.Name: Modified Stun Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: Alternative stun recovery rate under special conditions. In seconds per second.

Fields.Name: Fade-In Time
Fields.Description: Time taken for character to visually fade in. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Spawn SFX
Fields.Description: Sound effect triggered on character spawn.

Fields.Name: Spell Parry Angle Threshold
Fields.Description: Valid angle window for spell parry detection.

Fields.Name: Poise Gauge
Fields.Description: Stagger resistance meter value.

Fields.Name: Poise Recovery Rate
Fields.Description: Rate at which poise regenerates per second.

Fields.Name: Modified Poise Gauge
Fields.Description: Alternative poise value under special conditions.

Fields.Name: Modified Poise Recovery Rate
Fields.Description: Alternative poise recovery rate under special conditions.

Fields.Name: Overkill Bonus Threshold
Fields.Description: HP percentage threshold used for overkill detection.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Time Reduction
Fields.Description: Amount of time reduced from multiplayer limit.

Fields.Name: Disable Multi-Lock-On
Fields.Description: Prevents locking onto multiple targets.

Fields.Name: Hollow State
Fields.Description: Marks the character as hollow/undead state.

Fields.Name: Enable Cloth Map Collision
Fields.Description: Enables cloth simulation collision with environment.

Fields.Name: NG+ Soul Scaling Category
Fields.Description: Category used for scaling soul rewards in NG+ cycles.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Table ID (Host)
Fields.Description: Loot table used for host player in first playthrough cycle.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Table ID (Guest)
Fields.Description: Loot table used for guest players in multiplayer.

Fields.Name: Guard Activation Delay
Fields.Description: Delay before guard becomes active after input.

Fields.Name: HP (NG+ Cycle 2)
Fields.Description: Health value for second playthrough cycle.

Fields.Name: HP (NG+ Cycle 3)
Fields.Description: Health value for third playthrough cycle.

Fields.Name: HP (NG+ Cycle 4)
Fields.Description: Health value for fourth playthrough cycle.

Fields.Name: HP (NG+ Cycle 5)
Fields.Description: Health value for fifth playthrough cycle.

Fields.Name: HP (NG+ Cycle 6)
Fields.Description: Health value for sixth playthrough cycle.

Fields.Name: HP (NG+ Cycle 7)
Fields.Description: Health value for seventh playthrough cycle.

Fields.Name: HP (NG+ Cycle 8)
Fields.Description: Health value for eighth playthrough cycle.

Fields.Name: Character Name Text ID
Fields.Description: Reference to localized display name text.

Fields.Name: High-Value Drop Flag
Fields.Description: Enables rare or high-value item drops.

Fields.Name: Can Be Thrown by Enemy
Fields.Description: Determines if the character can be grabbed/thrown.

Fields.Name: Projectile Nullification
Fields.Description: Removes all incoming projectiles.

Fields.Name: Reserved
Fields.Description: Unused parameter slot.

Fields.Name: Special Effect ID
Fields.Description: Reference to applied special effect configuration.
